title: Log in and reach the dashboard
description: Verifies an admin can log in with valid credentials and land on the main dashboard with core widgets visible.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the dashboard
Verify dashboard widgets for KPIs, agents, map, and recent orders are displayed

title: Prevent access to dashboard when not authenticated
description: Verifies that an unauthenticated user attempting to access the dashboard is redirected to the login page.

steps.description: Verify the user is redirected to the login page

title: Load dashboard with core operational widgets
description: Verifies a logged-in admin can load the dashboard and see KPI cards, agent grid, map, and discovery feed.

steps.description: Verify the agent grid and the interactive map are displayed

title: Open the agents page from the dashboard
description: Verifies a dispatcher can navigate from the dashboard to the agents list page and see the agents list content.

steps.description: Click the navigation control to view agents
Verify the agents list page is displayed
Verify a list or grid of agents is displayed

title: View points transaction history
description: Verifies a finance admin can open financial management and see points transaction history displayed.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify points transaction history is displayed

title: Reject invalid login credentials
description: Verifies entering invalid credentials prevents login and shows an authentication error while remaining unauthenticated.

steps.description: Fill invalid-user@example.com into the email field
Fill wrong-password into the password field
Verify a login error is visible
Verify the user remains on the login page

title: Redeem points successfully within withdrawal limits
description: Verifies a finance admin can redeem points within limits and sees a success confirmation and updated points state.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill a valid redeemable amount within the allowed limit into the points redemption amount field
Verify a redemption success confirmation is visible
Verify the points history reflects the new redemption entry

title: Filter agents by status on agents page
description: Verifies an admin can filter the agents list by status and the results update accordingly.

steps.description: Click the navigation control to view agents
Select a specific status filter for agents
Verify the agents list updates to show agents matching the selected status

title: Open payments list
description: Verifies an authenticated user can open the payments page and see a list of payment records.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify a list of payments is displayed

title: View agent details from the agents list
description: Verifies an admin can open an agent detail view from the agents list and see agent information displayed.

steps.description: Click the navigation control to view agents
Open the details for one agent in the list
Verify an agent detail view is displayed
Verify agent profile or performance information is displayed

title: Switch dashboard agent status filter
description: Verifies the dashboard agent grid can be filtered by an agent status and the displayed agent list updates accordingly.

steps.description: Select a different agent status in the dashboard agent status filter
Verify the agent grid updates to reflect the selected status

title: View customers list
description: Verifies an authenticated admin can open the customers page and see a list of customers.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify a customers list is displayed

title: Prevent redemption when amount exceeds withdrawal limit
description: Verifies submitting a redemption above the limit is blocked and a withdrawal limit validation error is shown.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill an amount that clearly exceeds the displayed withdrawal limit into the points redemption amount field
Verify a withdrawal limit validation error is visible

title: Filter payments by a valid status
description: Verifies a user can apply a valid status filter and the payments list updates accordingly.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Select a valid payment status in the status filter control
Verify the payments list updates to reflect the selected status filter

title: Search or filter customers
description: Verifies an admin can narrow the customers list using an on-page search or filter control.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill a query into the customer search field using a generic term likely to match multiple records
Verify the customers list updates to match the search query

title: Open unregistered customers list
description: Verifies an authenticated admin can open unregistered customers and see the page content rendered.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify unregistered customers are displayed or an empty state is visible

title: View messaging threads
description: Verifies an authenticated user can access the messages area and see message threads listed.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open the messages area
Verify a list of message threads is displayed

title: Request a password reset from forgot password page
description: Verifies an admin can request a password reset email from the forgot password page and sees a confirmation state.

steps.description: Fill a valid email address into the email field
Submit the password reset request form
Verify a password reset request confirmation is visible

title: Create a new message thread
description: Verifies an authenticated user can create a new messaging thread and it appears in the threads list.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open the messages area
Start creating a new message thread
Select a valid recipient or participant
Fill a subject value into the subject field
Fill a short message into the message body field
Verify the new thread appears in the threads list

title: View administrators list
description: Verifies a Super Admin can access the admins area and see a list of administrators displayed.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open the admins area
Verify a list of administrators is displayed

title: View permissions and roles data
description: Verifies a Super Admin can open the permissions area and see permissions and roles displayed.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open the permissions area
Verify a permissions list and a roles list are displayed

title: Navigate to registration and submit new admin registration
description: Verifies a new admin can open the registration page and submit the registration form with valid information.

steps.description: Fill a valid email address into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Fill matching password confirmation into the confirm password field
Verify a registration submitted confirmation state is visible

title: Handle invalid payments status filter input
description: Verifies using an unknown status filter value results in a visible validation or error state without breaking the page.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill an unknown value into the payment status filter input if it is editable
Verify an invalid filter error is visible or the filter is rejected without applying

title: Create a new administrator with a valid role
description: Verifies a Super Admin can create a new administrator and the new admin appears in the admins list.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open the admins area
Fill a unique name into the name field
Fill a unique email into the email field
Select a valid role for the administrator
Verify the newly created administrator appears in the administrators list

title: Hide or block role editing for non-admin users
description: Verifies a non-admin user cannot access role editing controls or complete a role update from the permissions area.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open the permissions area
Attempt to open role editing for an existing role
Verify role editing is not available or access is blocked for the current user

title: Prevent sending an empty message
description: Verifies the messaging composer prevents sending when the message body is empty and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open the messages area
Start creating a new message thread
Select a valid recipient or participant
Fill a subject value into the subject field
Verify a message body validation error is visible and the thread is not created

title: Prevent administrator creation when role is invalid or missing
description: Verifies the create-admin form blocks submission and shows a validation error when the role input is invalid or missing.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open the admins area
Fill a unique name into the name field
Fill a unique email into the email field
Clear the role selection so no role is selected
Verify a role validation error is visible and the administrator is not created

title: Prevent creating a permission when required fields are missing
description: Verifies the permission creation UI enforces required fields and shows a validation error when the input is incomplete.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open the permissions area
Verify a validation error is visible and the permission is not created
